name: agents-markdown-formatter
description: AI-agent-safe GFM and MDX Markdown formatter powered by Oxc oxfmt with structural guards

scripts.format: node skills/markdown-formatter/src/index.js --fix README.md AGENTS.md CHANGELOG.md skills/markdown-formatter/SKILL.md
scripts.format:check: node skills/markdown-formatter/src/index.js --check README.md AGENTS.md CHANGELOG.md skills/markdown-formatter/SKILL.md
scripts.verify: node skills/markdown-formatter/src/index.js --verify README.md AGENTS.md CHANGELOG.md skills/markdown-formatter/SKILL.md
